data.title: Ethereum News: ETH Remains Top Destination for Blockchain Developers, Data Confirm
data.description:
Key Insights: New data from Electric Capital suggested that most new crypto developers had turned to the Ethereum ecosystem this year, with Solana and Bitcoin following behind. Between January and September, more than 16,000 developers reportedly joined Ethereum, according to figures shared by the Ethereum Foundation, which cited Electric Capital’s analysis.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/17/ethereum-news-eth-remains-top-destination-for-blockchain-developers-data-confirm/

data.title: The ETH long position of "Maji Big Brother" was liquidated again, and the current balance in his account is only $32,800
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, "Brother Maji's" ETH long position was liquidated again, and his current account balance is only $32,800. He experienced a floating profit of $43.64 million to a floating loss of $13 million.

data.title: Bybit Alpha launches DOOD
data.description: Bybit Alpha has newly launched DOOD, which is now open for trading.

data.title: Federal Reserve Highlights Ongoing Economic Impact of Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Musalem emphasized that the effects of tariffs continue to permeate the economy, with expectations that this will persist until mid-next year. Retailers are increasingly feeling the pressure to pass on tariff costs, while inflation remains a significant concern for consumers. Musalem stressed the importance of restoring the inflation rate to 2%, expressing full commitment to this target and indicating that the Federal Reserve supports this goal.

data.title: OG whales dump Solana, Aave, and Aster
data.description:
The crypto market has experienced major volatility over the past 24 hours, causing even whales to lose confidence. OG whales have dumped Solana, AAVE, and ASTER, moving over $120M in assets to exchanges. The cryptocurrency market is in a bloodbath after recording a 5% decline overall. This has brought the market cap down to $3. 5 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/og-whales-dump-solana-aave-and-aster/

data.title: Inside Tether’s Open-Source Wallet Push – A Step Toward Cross-Chain Dominance?
data.description:
Tether has announced the open-sourcing of its Wallet Development Kit (WDK) — a modular framework designed to simplify the creation of secure, multi-chain, self-custodial wallets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/inside-tethers-open-source-wallet-push-a-step-toward-cross-chain-dominance/

data.title: Ethena Labs partners with Conduit to launch stablecoin-as-a-service solution
data.description: Ethena Labs announced that its "Stablecoin-as-a-Service" solution is now available on the Conduit platform. Blockchain projects built using Conduit can directly use Ethena's infrastructure and build stablecoins out of the box when deployed.

data.title: Why did I receive a Trezor phishing email from Substack?
data.description:
Cryptocurrency phishing emails are pretending to be Trezor in an attempt to gain access to users' cryptocurrency.
source: https://protos.com/why-did-i-receive-a-trezor-phishing-email-from-substack/

data.title: CZ: I have browsed a number of prediction market projects on BNB Chain, but I am not sure about the potential market size.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that he had just taken a quick look at more than 20 prediction market startups on BNB Chain. He said that perhaps someone would have the opportunity to build an oracle specifically for prediction markets. He was not sure how big the potential market (TAM) was, but it might be worth a try.

data.title: BlackRock deposited 272.4 BTC to Coinbase and withdrew 12,098 ETH
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, BlackRock deposited 272.4 BTC (US$28.36 million) into Coinbase Prime about 5 hours ago; and 1 hour ago, BlackRock withdrew 12,098 ETH (US$45.47 million) from Coinbase Prime.

data.title: Altcoin crash puts 100+ ETF applications on ice as Wall Street scrambles
data.description:
Wall Street’s attempt to cash in on the altcoin wave just hit a wall. Over 130 ETF applications tied to risky crypto tokens are now effectively frozen, after a violent crash last week erased billions of dollars and exposed how thin, unstable, and illiquid most of these coins still are. The same applications that flooded […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/altcoin-crash-puts-etf-applications-on-ice/

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of 4,998 BTC, while the Ethereum ETF had a net inflow of 4,202 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 4,998 BTC, of ​​which ARK 21Shares had an outflow of 2,544 BTC, and currently holds 42,474 BTC; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 4,202 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 12,098 ETH, and currently holds 4,052,934 ETH.

data.title: Analysis: The road to the upside for risk assets will be more turbulent
data.description: Trading information platform Kobeissi Letter published an article on the X platform stating that US investor leverage has nearly doubled over the past two years, a similar rate of growth to the post-pandemic period in 2020. In September, US investors took on an additional $67 billion in margin debt, bringing the total to a record $1.13 trillion. 5x leveraged ETFs for US stocks have just been submitted to the SEC. These ETFs will cover everything from Nvidia to cryptocurrencies. This means that if Nvidia drops 10% in a single day, the leveraged ETFs will drop 50%, making the upward trajectory of risky assets even more volatile. Risk appetite is at an all-time high, with everyone eager to participate in the AI ​​revolution. US household stock allocations have reached a record 52%, exceeding the 2000 peak of 48% by 4 percentage points and doubling the 2008 low. Americans are flocking to the stock market.
